allow: Bash(ls -la /c/Users/pc/Documents/田中健太作業フォルダ/開発/hojo_get/.env*)
Bash(docker compose exec collector python collector.py)

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) FROM subsidies GROUP BY source; SELECT title, source, end_date FROM subsidies ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f""[{s[''source'']}] {s[''title''][:50]} / 期限:{s[''end_date'']}""\) for s in data[''subsidies'']]; print\(f""合計: {data[''total'']}件""\)")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) FROM subsidies GROUP BY source;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT source, region FROM subsidies LIMIT 20;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT id, source, region FROM subsidies ORDER BY source, id;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "ALTER TABLE subsidies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS prefecture TEXT; ALTER TABLE subsidies ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS city TEXT;")

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT prefecture, city, count\(*\) FROM subsidies WHERE prefecture IS NOT NULL AND prefecture != '''' GROUP BY prefecture, city ORDER BY prefecture, city LIMIT 20;")

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT prefecture, city, count\(*\) FROM subsidies WHERE prefecture IS NOT NULL AND prefecture <> '''' GROUP BY prefecture, city ORDER BY prefecture, city LIMIT 20;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT prefecture, city, COUNT\(*\) FROM subsidies GROUP BY prefecture, city ORDER BY prefecture, city;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c ":*)
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) as 件数 FROM subsidies GROUP BY source;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT id, title, prefecture, city FROM subsidies WHERE source = ''portal'' ORDER BY id;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT id, title, prefecture, city, region FROM subsidies WHERE id = 1;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT prefecture, city, title FROM subsidies WHERE prefecture = ''愛知県'' ORDER BY city;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U hojo_user -d hojo_db -c "SELECT id, prefecture, city, region, title FROM subsidies WHERE prefecture = ''愛知県'' ORDER BY id;")
